item.name: Island Mandragora
item.description: With just a single exposure to the sunlight outside of your bag, this island mandragora shall be primed to bear you forth like the most cacophonous of steeds.

mount.name: Island Mandragora
mount.action: Summon forth your island mandragora, a prime piece of island produce.
mount.description: Born into an influential family in the West Mandra Empire, fabled nation of vegetables, this mandragora grew to its prodigious size thanks to fertile soil and abundant sunlight. Alas, its blessed upbringing could also be considered a curse, for it is the fate of such prime produce to go to market.
mount.tooltip:
I'd be much obliged if
you could rid the field
of some mandragoras.
- Gurcant
